summary: Complete testing of Vaccine Agent (Agente de Vacinas) feature. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - MARIA SILVA has up_to_date status, ANA OLIVEIRA has not_up_to_date status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vaccine Agent feature fully implemented and tested. Role 'agente_vacinas' redirects to /vacinas dashboard. Dashboard shows 4 summary cards (Total, Em Dia, Não em Dia, Não Verificado), search by name (min 3 chars), status filter, and student list with 'Em dia'/'Pendente' buttons. Attendance page shows vaccine status dots before student names (green=up_to_date, yellow=not_up_to_date, gray=not_verified).

backend_tests.test_vaccine_agent_login_success: PASSED - Vaccine agent can login and has role 'agente_vacinas'
backend_tests.test_get_vaccine_summary: PASSED - GET /api/vaccines/summary returns total_students, up_to_date, not_up_to_date, not_verified
backend_tests.test_list_students_vaccine_status: PASSED - GET /api/vaccines/students returns paginated list with vaccine status
backend_tests.test_update_vaccine_status_up_to_date: PASSED - PUT /api/vaccines/status/{id} sets status to up_to_date
backend_tests.test_update_vaccine_status_not_up_to_dat: PASSED - PUT /api/vaccines/status/{id} sets status to not_up_to_date
backend_tests.test_get_vaccine_status_batch: PASSED - GET /api/vaccines/status/batch returns statuses for multiple students
backend_tests.test_search_students_by_name: PASSED - Search filter works with min 3 characters

frontend_tests.test_1_vaccine_agent_login_redirect: PASSED - Login as vacinas@sigesc.com redirects to /vacinas
frontend_tests.test_2_vaccine_dashboard_functionality: PASSED - Summary cards show correct counts, search works, status filter works, clicking 'Em dia'/'Pendente' updates status and summary
frontend_tests.test_3_attendance_vaccine_indicator: PASSED - Vaccine status dots appear before student names in Attendance page (green=up_to_date, yellow=not_up_to_date, gray=not_verified)

features_verified.vaccine_agent_role: Role 'agente_vacinas' added to models.py Literal type
features_verified.vaccine_dashboard_route: /vacinas route protected for admin, admin_teste, agente_vacinas
features_verified.summary_cards: 4 cards: Total de Alunos, Em Dia, Não está em Dia, Não Verificado
features_verified.search_filter: Search by name with minimum 3 characters
features_verified.status_filter: Filter by vaccine status (not_verified, up_to_date, not_up_to_date)
features_verified.school_filter: Filter by school (global access for vaccine agent)
features_verified.status_buttons: 'Em dia' and 'Pendente' buttons for each student
features_verified.status_persistence: Status saved to vaccine_status collection in MongoDB
features_verified.summary_update: Summary cards update after status change
features_verified.attendance_indicator: Colored dots before student names in Attendance page
